name: Tamari Ginger Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, whisk together the tamari and brown rice vinegar.
2. Add the ginger juice and whisk again.
3. Stir in the chopped parsley.
4. Mix in the mirin until well combined.
5. Gradually add the water, stirring continuously until the desired consistency is reached.
6. Adjust seasoning if needed and set aside to cool before using.
